name: pesquisaPorCliente
code: SELECT TC.NOME AS name, ROUND(AVG(P.VALOR), 1) AS value, COUNT(*) AS total FROM PESQUISAS P JOIN TICKET_CLIENTES TC ON TC.TICKET_ID = P.TICKET_ID WHERE ('{{mes}}' = '' OR SUBSTRING(P.DATA_RESPOSTA, 1, 7) = '{{mes}}') AND ('{{dataInicio}}' = '' OR P.DATA_RESPOSTA >= '{{dataInicio}}') AND ('{{dataFim}}' = '' OR P.DATA_RESPOSTA <= '{{dataFim}}') AND TC.NOME IS NOT NULL AND TC.NOME != '' GROUP BY TC.NOME ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 20
